_README: Copy this file to .scrub-patterns.local.json (which is gitignored) and replace the example values below with your real organizational identifiers. Each KEY is the real string to find; each VALUE is the safe placeholder it will be replaced with. Patterns are matched as literal strings (regex-escaped automatically). Order matters — put more-specific patterns before less-specific ones (e.g. full email before just the domain).
_README_LAB_SECRETS: The Lab-Kit\Reference\ docs use placeholders like <LAB-ADMIN-PASSWORD> for real lab passwords. If you ever paste a real value into a doc by accident, add the real value as a KEY here so Scrub-Repo.ps1 catches it on the next run. Examples below are commented-out shapes only — replace with your real values in .scrub-patterns.local.json.
